title: helichrysum nitens
intro: Helichrysum nitens, also known as the yellow mountain daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum nitens include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and promoting wound healing, among others. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum nitens can be found in the form of essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of conditions, from skin irritations to digestive problems.
